ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Defender, Midfielder) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 2-1) */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'played', 'postponed') */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player earning points */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which points were earned */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player in that match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in that match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in that match */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player in that match */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player in that match */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player in that match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user regarding the player's performance */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_ratings" (
  "expert_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert rating record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the expert */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the expert regarding the player's performance */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_ratings_expert_id FOREIGN KEY ("expert_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the comment is about */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "average_user_rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the player */,
  "average_expert_rating" REAL /* Average expert rating for the player */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player (calculated from user and expert ratings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_summary_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* User rating on that date */,
  "expert_rating" REAL /* Expert rating on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain) */,
  "date_injured" TEXT /* Date when the player was injured */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stats record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in that match */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Total touches by the player in that match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Total passes completed by the player in that match */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the player in that match */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Total tackles won by the player in that match */,
  " Saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the player in that match */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the player in that match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match highlight record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_highlights_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
